name: The Ritual
short_description: The ritual is a third person survival horror game. You have been hired to find out how a school began crawling with demons. Search the school for information. Run. Scream. Shoot. And remember don't get caught.
detailed_description:
The ritual is a third person survival horror game. You have been hired to find out how a school began crawling with demons. Search the school for information. Run. Scream. Shoot. And remember don't get caught.

ARE YOU READY FOR THE EVIL WITHIN ?



Collect information and details from items left behind to help guide you around the school

Replayability which allows you to restart the game with already acquired and crafted weapons

Every demon is confined to a section of the school and has a different AI pattern of claiming victims

Players are able to craft random items collected into weapons to ensure survival.

supported_languages:
English*, French, German, Japanese, Simplified Chinese
*languages with full audio support
